title: cracca vicioides
intro: Cracca vicioides, also known as broom-leaved broomrape, is a parasitic flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cracca vicioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and treat respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic to relieve urinary issues. The plant is typically harvested in its flowering stage and can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
